---
title: "Hi, I'm Temur Khan."
description: "Production AI engineer. Shipping MCPs + Aufgaard plugin for production AI ops."
pagetitle: "Temur Khan — production AI engineer"
toc: false
---

I ship production-AI ops tools. Currently building **[Aufgaard](https://github.com/temurkhan13/aufgaard)** — an open-source plugin that bundles 7 MCP servers + skills + hooks for Claude Code and Cursor.

Outside building tools, I also:

- **Write** about production AI failure patterns — silent failures, hallucinated success, agent supply-chain attacks, cost spikes. [See the catalog →](posts.qmd)
- **Audit** production AI deployments — 1-3 weeks, written report against a 35-pattern catalog with 90-day follow-up. [Hire me →](hire.qmd)
- **Build** custom MCP servers for B2B SaaS APIs and ops platforms. [Hire me →](hire.qmd)
- **Available** for advisory + short-form consulting via email below.

The 7 MCP servers + Aufgaard plugin are bundled together as the [Production-AI MCP Suite](https://temurah.gumroad.com/l/production-ai-mcp-suite) — a $99 buyer-only field reference for operators who own the system.

---

## Tools I've shipped

| Tool | What it catches | Install |
|------|-----------------|---------|
| [silentwatch-mcp](https://github.com/temurkhan13/silentwatch-mcp) | Cron silent failures (exit 0, empty stdout) | `pip install silentwatch-mcp` |
| [bash-vet-mcp](https://github.com/temurkhan13/bash-vet-mcp) | Destructive shell commands LLMs propose | `pip install bash-vet-mcp` |
| [openclaw-output-vetter-mcp](https://github.com/temurkhan13/openclaw-output-vetter-mcp) | Hallucinated agent claims vs reality | `pip install openclaw-output-vetter-mcp` |
| [openclaw-skill-vetter-mcp](https://github.com/temurkhan13/openclaw-skill-vetter-mcp) | Third-party skill prompt-injection / exfil | `pip install openclaw-skill-vetter-mcp` |
| [openclaw-cost-tracker-mcp](https://github.com/temurkhan13/openclaw-cost-tracker-mcp) | Per-agent cost + 429 prediction | `pip install openclaw-cost-tracker-mcp` |
| [openclaw-health-mcp](https://github.com/temurkhan13/openclaw-health-mcp) | Single-pane deployment health | `pip install openclaw-health-mcp` |
| [openclaw-upgrade-orchestrator-mcp](https://github.com/temurkhan13/openclaw-upgrade-orchestrator-mcp) | Upgrade safety + provider-side regression catalog | `pip install openclaw-upgrade-orchestrator-mcp` |
| [aufgaard](https://github.com/temurkhan13/aufgaard) | All 7 above + skills + hooks bundled | Claude Code / Cursor plugin |

[All tools →](tools.qmd)

---

## Recent writing

Latest essays on production-AI failure patterns. [See all →](posts.qmd)

::: {#recent-posts}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
fetch('posts.xml')
  .then(r => r.text())
  .then(t => {
    const xml = new DOMParser().parseFromString(t, 'text/xml');
    const items = [...xml.querySelectorAll('item')].slice(0, 5);
    const html = items.map(i => {
      const title = i.querySelector('title')?.textContent;
      const link = i.querySelector('link')?.textContent;
      const date = new Date(i.querySelector('pubDate')?.textContent).toISOString().slice(0,10);
      return `<div style="margin: 0.6em 0;"><span style="color: #888; font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.9em;">${date}</span> · <a href="${link}">${title}</a></div>`;
    }).join('');
    document.getElementById('recent-posts').innerHTML = html;
  })
  .catch(() => {});
</script>
```

---

## Contact

Audit / Custom MCP Build inquiries: **[hello@temhan.dev](mailto:hello@temhan.dev)**

Use one of these subject lines for fastest routing:

- `AI audit inquiry` — for production AI audit engagements
- `Custom MCP Build inquiry` — for custom server / plugin work
- `Advisory` — for short-form consulting / call

I reply within 2 business days.
